description: Fetch the human PTEN crystal structure (PDB: 1D5R). Color the Phosphatase domain (residues 14-185) and the C2 domain (residues 190-350) distinctly. Highlight the clinical cancer mutations C124, G129, R130, C211, and D331. Measure the CA-CA distances from the catalytic C124 to each of the other four mutated residues. Render a publication-quality figure and write a structural report mapping each mutation to its domain and recording the 4 distance measurements. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/pten_mutations.png and the report to ~/PyMOL_Data/pten_mutation_report.txt.
